title: PWN/BabyWin
summary: Exploiting a format string vulnerability in a Win64 PE binary running under Wine 8.0. Includes mapping registers/stack, bypassing read-only memory, and constructing a Win64 ROP chain.

title: ROP (Return Oriented Programming): A Practical Primer
summary: From stack resources and janitorial gadgets to stack pivots, syscalls, and modern defenses.
